data.title: Test: Feed connected!
data.selftext: This is a test article. If you see this in VRChat, the GitHub Pages feed is working. Next step: connect a live news source.

data.title: Test: Panel 2
data.selftext: Second test article. The feed is pulling from caergai.github.io/news_feed/docs/feed.json via VRCStringDownloader.

data.title: Test: Panel 3
data.selftext: Third test article. Once all three show up, we can automate this with a GitHub Actions workflow that fetches live news.
